description: IntuneDeviceActions — cruscotto operativo (Grafana). Import after provisioning via infra/dashboard-grafana.bicep. Replace ${DS_AZURE} and ${DS_AI} with your Azure Monitor and Application Insights data source UIDs (or use the Grafana variables defined below).

list.name: sb_resource_id
list.label: SB resource ID
list.description: Full ARM ID of the Service Bus namespace. /subscriptions/.../namespaces/<name>

title: IntuneDeviceActions — Cruscotto

panels.title: Service Bus — active messages per queue
panels.description: Coda piena: consumer fermo (function app non triggera) o backlog. Soglie indicative: giallo >=10, rosso >=50.

panels.title: Service Bus — dead-letter messages per queue
panels.description: Qualunque valore > 0 e' un'anomalia: consumer ha esaurito i retry oppure payload invalido.

panels.title: Capability runners — invocations (15m)
panels.description: WipeAction / AutopilotRegister / RotateBitLockerKeys / Rename: numero di invocazioni recenti per role. Zero su tutti = pipeline ferma.

azureLogAnalytics.query: requests | where timestamp > ago(15m) | where cloud_RoleName has_any ('wipe','autopilot','bitlocker','rename') | summarize count() by cloud_RoleName | order by cloud_RoleName asc

panels.title: Ledger — entries bloccate (action.already-issued ultime 24h)
panels.description: Ogni riga e' una richiesta deduplicata silenziosamente. Stesso device ripetuto = ledger stuck (poller mai a terminal), reset via DELETE blob in action-ledger.

azureLogAnalytics.query: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(24h) | where name == 'action.already-issued' | extend device = tostring(customDimensions.deviceName), intune = tostring(customDimensions.intuneDeviceId), corr = tostring(customDimensions.correlationId), origCorr = tostring(customDimensions.originalCorrelationId) | project timestamp, device, intune, corr, origCorr | order by timestamp desc | take 50

panels.title: Web (intake) — HTTP success/failure
panels.description: Richieste accettate dal client. Spike di 4xx = client mTLS misconfigured; 5xx = bug intake.

azureLogAnalytics.query: requests | where timestamp > $__timeFrom() and timestamp < $__timeTo() | where cloud_RoleName has 'web' | summarize success = countif(success == true), failure = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 1m) | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Graph dependency — p95 latency / failure rate
panels.description: Latency in degrado o picco di failure dalle capability runner verso Microsoft Graph.

azureLogAnalytics.query: dependencies | where timestamp > $__timeFrom() and timestamp < $__timeTo() | where type == 'HTTP' and target has 'graph.microsoft.com' | summarize p95 = percentile(duration, 95), failures = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 1m) | order by timestamp asc
